zh.summary: 把 NotebookLM 的核心体验改造成可维护的中文知识工作流实验。
problem: 中文知识整理和 AI 阅读工具经常停留在零散 prompt 和单次对话里，难以形成可复用的工作流。
原型需要同时处理内容输入、AI 辅助理解、界面表达和长期维护，而不是只做一个页面。
systemOverview: 以 GitHub 仓库作为公开记录，把 README、部署状态和案例页面连接成一个可以持续更新的系统档案。
案例展示不只呈现 UI，而是记录输入、处理、反馈和扩展路径。
aiOrchestration: 使用 Codex 辅助代码实现、结构整理和回归检查。
把模型输出限制在可审阅的代码、文档和配置里，减少一次性生成带来的维护负担。
results: 形成了一个可以长期更新的中文 AI 知识工作流案例。
把项目说明、技术记录和线上展示连接成同一条可维护链路。
为后续 RAG、知识库、自动化整理和多模型协作留下结构入口。
learnings: AI Native 案例应该记录系统如何工作，而不只是展示完成后的界面。
长期可扩展的工作流需要把内容源、自动化和部署反馈都纳入设计。

en.summary: Adapting NotebookLM's core experience into a maintainable Chinese knowledge workflow experiment.
problem: Chinese knowledge tools and AI reading assistants often stay at scattered prompts and one-off conversations, making it hard to build reusable workflows.
A prototype needs to handle content input, AI-assisted understanding, UI expression, and long-term maintenance simultaneously — not just build a page.
systemOverview: Using the GitHub repo as a public record, connecting README, deployment status, and case pages into a continuously updatable system archive.
Case presentation shows not just the UI, but records the input, processing, feedback, and scaling path.
aiOrchestration: Using Codex for code implementation, structural organization, and regression checks.
Constraining model output to reviewable code, docs, and configs to reduce maintenance overhead from one-shot generation.
results: Built a long-term maintainable Chinese AI knowledge workflow case.
Connected project documentation, technical records, and live showcase into a single maintainable pipeline.
Left structural entry points for future RAG, knowledge bases, automated curation, and multi-model collaboration.
learnings: AI Native cases should record how the system works, not just showcase the finished interface.
Long-term scalable workflows need content sources, automation, and deployment feedback baked into the design.

architecture.label: Content source
architecture.detail: README and repository metadata become the source record for the public case page.

architecture.label: Interface
architecture.detail: Next.js renders the public archive and keeps the case detail route stable.

architecture.label: Automation
architecture.detail: Build, deploy, and status feedback are connected through GitHub and Vercel workflows.
